profile.name: Sana Q.
profile.title: Viral Short-Form Video Editor | Instagram Reels & TikTok
profile.overview: I help brands, creators, and agencies turn raw footage, products, scripts, and ideas into high-retention TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, UGC ads, AI creatives, and product videos.

portfolioItems.title: Cash Next Product Videos
portfolioItems.description: Product-led TikTok, Reels, and UGC-style ads with captions, motion callouts, and clean pacing.
portfolioItems.result: Built to explain the product quickly and increase buyer interest.

portfolioItems.title: About Video Editing Promo
portfolioItems.description: Professional edit for TikTok, Shorts, and YouTube with clear structure, captions, and scroll-friendly cuts.
portfolioItems.result: Turns a simple message into a polished creator-style promo.

portfolioItems.title: UGC Video Creation Ad
portfolioItems.description: High-converting UGC video for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and AI-driven ad campaigns.
portfolioItems.result: Designed for quick hooks, social proof, and direct response testing.

portfolioItems.title: AI Influencer Video
portfolioItems.description: AI-assisted influencer-style video with voice, captions, avatar direction, and ad-focused editing.
portfolioItems.result: Creates a modern AI creative that feels native to short-form platforms.

portfolioItems.title: Ceramic Coating Reel
portfolioItems.description: Satisfying before-after edit with close details, glossy reveals, and premium pacing.
portfolioItems.result: Showcases quality and drives booking interest.

portfolioItems.title: Social Media Video Creator
portfolioItems.description: Long footage turned into short social clips with hooks, reframing, subtitles, and platform-ready exports.
portfolioItems.result: Creates multiple short-form assets from raw client footage.

portfolioItems.title: Instagram Reels Edit Pack
portfolioItems.description: Fast-paced talking-head reels with jump cuts, bold captions, SFX, and strong retention flow.
portfolioItems.result: Makes educational and promotional content easier to watch.

portfolioItems.title: Automobile Promo Video
portfolioItems.description: Vehicle ad with cinematic detail shots, feature labels, offer CTA, and premium reveal pacing.
portfolioItems.result: Created for social ad promotion and dealership-style campaigns.

portfolioItems.title: Restaurant Menu Promo
portfolioItems.description: Fast-moving food reel with close-ups, offer text, transitions, and warm color direction.
portfolioItems.result: Highlights menu items for social promotion.

portfolioItems.title: Gaming Highlight Short
portfolioItems.description: Gameplay moment edited with reactions, zooms, subtitles, impact SFX, and energetic rhythm.
portfolioItems.result: Optimized for Shorts and Reels discovery.

portfolioItems.title: DJ Event Recap
portfolioItems.description: Beat-synced event edit with crowd energy, flashes, transitions, and brand title cards.

portfolioItems.title: Construction Progress Edit
portfolioItems.description: Image-based progress video with animated frames, captions, map-style flow, and final reveal.
portfolioItems.result: Turns still images into a story-driven reel.

testimonials.text: Great work, fast delivery, and very creative editing. The final video looked professional and engaging.
Strong communication and clean edits. The captions, pacing, and final exports were exactly what we needed.
The ad felt modern and polished. Hooks, cuts, captions, and music were all handled with great attention.
Turned simple raw footage into a premium-looking reel. Very reliable and easy to work with.

certifications: Copywriting Course: From beginner to professional
